_curator_notes: v0.4.3.1 (2026-05-08): cargo-based verification is intractable in E2B for this image — base lacks clang and even small proc-macro crate `light-sdk-macros` fails at build-script link step (libc/proc-macro2/quote/serde_core build scripts require clang). install_config.json kept for audit but tests/test.sh now bypasses cargo entirely and runs source-grep checks against the canonical-patched files in sdk-libs/macros/src/light_pdas/. 6 weighted gates × Σ=1.0 covering: namespace-key addition, boolean-flag mechanism, AtaField struct field, parser logic, codegen wiring, and the 5 existing call-site updates. Buggy state confirmed → 0.0; canonical-fix → 1.0. Pattern mirrors moltis-task-ffe9ec.
